description: Canonical registry of all available skills in the AI Engineering Harness. Every tool-specific skill MUST reference its tool's official docs homepage (docsUrl) so the system always knows where to fetch authoritative documentation for creation and updates.

team-setup.name: team-setup
team-setup.description: Initialize and manage team configuration with init/list/add/assign commands

ticket-manager.name: ticket-manager
ticket-manager.description: Manage tickets across all namespaces (WOW, OPT, WOMONO, TEAM) with full lifecycle, TODO linking, and personal hierarchy

skill-auto-update.name: skill-auto-update
skill-auto-update.description: Auto-discover, sync, and update skills across all frontends

auto-ticket-creator.name: auto-ticket-creator
auto-ticket-creator.description: Monitor codebase, dependencies, and external sources to auto-create tickets

docs-sync-updater.name: docs-sync-updater
docs-sync-updater.description: Fetch latest docs from all agent frontend sources and auto-update skills/agents

cto-dashboard.name: cto-dashboard
cto-dashboard.description: CTO dashboard with ticket overview, developer progress, review queue, and GitHub integration

skill-adapter.name: skill-adapter
skill-adapter.description: Platform-specific skill/agent loading and format adapters for all 7 frontends

help-command.name: help-command
help-command.description: Unified /help command — lists skills, commands, agents, and workflows across the entire harness

core.description: Core reusable agents that work across any project
